══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Shifter — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Shifter — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Shifter — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Shifter — Unarmored Caster.
→ Shifter — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 20] FAIL! 27 necrotic damage. HP: 40/67
--- Shifter — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 40/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Shifter — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 30 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Shifter — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 10/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (10/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Shifter — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 4 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Shifter — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 27 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
